delete(CollegeBean) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.model.CollegeModel
Deletes a College record from the ST_COLLEGE table by its id.

Deletes a Course record from the ST_COURSE table by its id.

delete(MarksheetBean) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.model.MarksheetModel
Deletes an existing Marksheet record from the ST_MARKSHEET table based on the ID present in the provided MarksheetBean.
delete(RoleBean) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.model.RoleModel
Deletes an existing Role record from the ST_ROLE table based on the ID present in the provided RoleBean.
delete(StudentBean) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.model.StudentModel
Deletes an existing Student record from the ST_STUDENT table based on the ID present in the provided StudentBean.
delete(SubjectBean) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.model.SubjectModel
Deletes an existing Subject record from the ST_SUBJECT table based on the ID present in the provided SubjectBean.
delete(TimetableBean) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.model.TimetableModel
Deletes an existing Timetable record from the ST_TIMETABLE table based on the ID present in the provided TimetableBean.
delete(UserBean) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.model.UserModel
Deletes an existing User record from the ST_USER table based on the ID present in the provided UserBean.
